news.title: Indiana University and Zimmer Biomet launch research, workforce partnership
news.summary: IU and Zimmer Biomet announced a three-year collaboration supporting research, workforce development and innovation around joint replacement, bone healing and mobility.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for IU and Zimmer Biomet partnership news.

news.title: IU's musculoskeletal research brings better health solutions to communities and collaborators
news.summary: IU News described musculoskeletal research infrastructure, MSKMobile, the FIT Core and statewide community and industry collaboration relevant to IMPACT.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for IU musculoskeletal research story.

news.title: IMPACT advances bone and muscle health through research, technology and training
news.summary: IU News profiled IMPACT as a statewide consortium focused on musculoskeletal healthcare innovation, workforce training and economic development.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for IMPACT bone and muscle health feature.

news.title: Kelley professor part of NSF finalist consortium driving musculoskeletal innovation
news.summary: Kelley Indianapolis profiled Amrou Awaysheh and the business, technology and commercialization role within the IMPACT consortium.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for Kelley professor and NSF finalist consortium story.

news.title: IU-led consortium named NSF finalist for leadership in musculoskeletal healthcare innovation
news.summary: IU announced that the IMPACT consortium was named a finalist in the NSF Regional Innovation Engines competition.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for NSF Regional Innovation Engines finalist announcement.

news.title: IU orthopedic experts join BioCrossroads, OrthoWorx and Zimmer Biomet at FrameWORX Summit
news.summary: IU School of Medicine announced IU faculty participation in a Warsaw-area FrameWORX event focused on musculoskeletal health innovation and Indiana orthopedic leadership.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for IU orthopedic experts at FrameWORX Summit.

news.title: IU scientists develop new bone marrow imaging technique
news.summary: IU researchers developed a bone marrow imaging method with potential relevance for diseases involving bone marrow and MSK-related tissues.
news.imageAlt: Graphic for IU bone marrow imaging technique story.

news.title: IU School of Medicine names new director of Indiana Center for Musculoskeletal Health
news.summary: IU School of Medicine announced Melissa Kacena as director of the Indiana Center for Musculoskeletal Health.
